summary: Completed testing of Iteration 13 GRC modules: Dominios, Controles, Catálogo de Riesgos, and Hallazgos de Auditoría. All 31 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with tabs in Configuración (Dominios, Controles) and independent pages (Catálogo Riesgos, Hallazgos Auditoría). Reactive Riesgo Inherente calculation (Probabilidad × Impacto) working correctly in real-time.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic, not blocking
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing. Existing data: 6 Dominios, 4 Controles, 1 Riesgo in catalog, 3 Hallazgos.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 GRC modules fully tested: 1) Dominios CRUD at /api/config/dominios - fields: nombre_dominio, codigo_referencia. 2) Controles CRUD at /api/config/controles - fields: dominio_id, codigo_control, nombre_control. Filter by dominio_id works. 3) Catálogo Riesgos at /api/catalogo-riesgos - fields: codigo_riesgo, nombre_corto, descripcion_completa. Search and pagination work. 4) Hallazgos Auditoría at /api/hallazgos-auditoria - fields: codigo (auto-generated AUD-YYYY-XXX), control_id, brecha, riesgo_id, probabilidad (1-5), impacto (1-5), estado, observaciones. riesgo_inherente = probabilidad × impacto calculated automatically. Stats endpoint at /stats. 5) UI: Dominios and Controles are tabs in /configuracion. Catálogo Riesgos and Hallazgos Auditoría are independent pages in sidebar. 6) Hallazgo form has reactive riesgo_inherente calculation, cascading Dominio→Control dropdowns, and riesgo search modal.
